st.orm.core.spi.Provider

  • Uses of Provider in st.orm.core.spi

    Subinterfaces of Provider in st.orm.core.spi
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ConnectionProvider
    The connection provider is responsible for providing connections to the database.
    interface 
    EntityRepositoryProvider
    Provides pluggable entity repository logic.
    interface 
    ORMConverterProvider
    Provides pluggable ORM converter logic for record fields.
    interface 
    ORMReflectionProvider
    Provides pluggable ORM reflection logic.
    interface 
    ProjectionRepositoryProvider
    Provides pluggable projection repository logic.
    interface 
    QueryBuilderProvider
    Provides pluggable query builder logic.
    interface 
    SqlDialectProvider
    Provides the SQL dialect.
    interface 
    TransactionTemplateProvider
    The transaction template provider is responsible for integration with the Transaction subsystem.

  • Uses of Provider in st.orm.core.template

    Method parameters in st.orm.core.template with type arguments of type Provider
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JpaTemplate
    JpaTemplate.withProviderFilter(Predicate<Provider> providerFilter)
    Returns a new JPA template with the specified provider filter.
    PreparedStatementTemplate
    PreparedStatementTemplate.withProviderFilter(Predicate<Provider> providerFilter)
    Returns a new prepared statement template with the specified provider filter.
